description: Represents an egress policy of an application component.

ACLs.description: The list of ACLs to apply for the egress policy.
ACLs.title: ACLs

accessDeniedMessage.description: The message that is sent if the access is denied.
accessDeniedMessage.title: accessDeniedMessage

alertDefinition.description: The definition to use for alerting when action is deny.
alertDefinition.title: alertDefinition

disabled.description: If true, the policy is disabled and will not be applied.
disabled.title: disabled

name.description: The name of the egress policy.
name.title: name

policyID.description: The Policy ID is the unique identifier for this policy.
policyID.title: policyID

rules.description: The list of rules for the egress policy.
rules.title: rules

title: EgressPolicy
